description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image and defines two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a job named build that runs the exact commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y pandoc, apt-get install -y texlive-latex-base texlive-latex-extra dvipng, pip install sphinx, pip install sphinx_rtd_theme, and make html, then stores the .sphinx-forge directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a job named pages that moves .sphinx-forge/_build/html to a public directory with mv .sphinx-forge/_build/html public and publishes the public/ folder as the GitLab Pages artifact. Both jobs run on all branches with no additional triggers.
